content.title: The slidecreator.deck format
content.subheading: A portable, versioned deck interchange format

content.title: Why a format
content.body: A deck is **data**, not a rendering. The `slidecreator.deck` envelope lets a second implementation read, render, and round-trip a presentation without Deckyard.

content.alt: Envelope, slideTypes manifest, and slides array
content.caption: Local assets are referenced by upload URL; a .deck bundle embeds their bytes.
